BettingEventID.description: The unique ID assocated with the betting event

Name.description: The name of this betting event

Season.description: The MLB season of the betting event

BettingEventTypeID.description: The ID associated with the type of betting event

BettingEventType.description: Indicates the type of betting event - Game or Future

StartDate.description: The furthest forward time any book has a market set to close for this betting event

Created.description: The date and time when this betting event was created in US Eastern Time

Updated.description: The date and time of the last update made to this betting event (in US Eastern Time)

GameID.description: The unique ID of the game tied to this BettingEvent

GlobalGameID.description: A globally unique ID for the game tied to this BettingEvent. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

GameStatus.description: The status of the game in tied to this event

Quarter.description: The quarter of the game tied to this event

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the Home Team

AwayTeamID.description: The unique TeamID of the away team in the game tied to this BettingEvent

HomeTeamID.description: The unique ID of the home team tied to this BettingEvent

GlobalAwayTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the away team tied to this BettingEvent This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

GlobalHomeTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for the home team tied to this BettingEvent. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.

AwayTeamScore.description: Score of the away team tied to this betting event (updated after game ends to allow for resolving bets)

HomeTeamScore.description: Score of the home team tied to this betting event (updated after game ends to allow for resolving bets)

TotalScore.description: The combined scores of the home and away team of the game tied to this event (post-game)

AwayRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of away team for this game

HomeRotationNumber.description: Rotation number of home team for this game

BettingMarkets.description: The list of betting markets for this event

GameStartTime.description: The date and time the game starts
